method: per subject: one fetch agent + one independent refute-skeptic, against AP Central /exam (sections, weights, parts) AND AP Students /assessment (overall Exam Duration)

parts.name: Question 1: Project Presentation
parts.toolNote: 3 minutes to prepare; 3 minutes to present
parts.quote: Question 1: Project Presentation: 20% of Score Deliver a presentation in response to the project prompt about what you learned through your research. (3 minutes to prepare; 3 minutes to present.)

parts.name: Question 2: Project Q&A

parts.name: Question 3: Story Narration + Question 4: Email Response (Writing)
parts.toolNote: combined time for both writing tasks
parts.quote: Question 3: Story Narration: 7.5% of Score Write a story based on four provided pictures. You'll have 30 minutes to complete both writing tasks (Questions 3 and 4).
